description: This soft reversible check scarf from femella with stitched sides, in purple, is made of blended fabric that offers exemplary comfort, making it an outfit essential and a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Wear it over a jacket or use it to smarten up a casual ensemble. Length: 198 cm Width: 36 cm Wash care Machine wash in warm water separately only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry low Medium iron
